author: IGN YouTube
summary: Rustmourneは、古代の放棄された構造物の廊下を探索し、そこに潜む苦悶の存在に立ち向かうSFホラーVRサバイバルゲームです。隠れるか、逃げるか、手足を切断して生き残る必要があります。SteamVR向けに近日発売予定です。
raw_text:
Rustmourne - Official Gameplay Trailer | Upload VR Showcase 2026
Take a look at the Gameplay Trailer for Rustmourne, an upcoming sci-fi horror VR survival game. Players will traverse the corridors of an ancient, derelict structure, and face the tortured beings in it: hide, run, or cut off their limbs to survive. Rustmourne is coming soon to SteamVR.

#ign #gaming

summary: ソニックチームの飯塚氏は、全てのソニックタイトルを現行プラットフォームで展開したい意向を表明。可能であれば「魔法のように」実現したいと語った。
raw_text:
Sonic Team head wants all Sonic games on modern platforms, would “magically do it” if possible

If Sonic Team head Takashi Iizuka had his way, he’d have all modern Sonic the Hedgehog games on modern platforms. Iizuka was speaking with Jeremy Klinger about various topics pertaining to the series. At one point, he was asked to select the one game he’d remake if given the opportunity. In response, Iizuka mentioned that he’d love to be able...

＜Masters Londonについて＞
Masters Londonは2026年6月6日〜6月21日にイギリス・ロンドンで開催される、VALORANT Champions Tour 2026の第2回国際大会です。世界4地域（Pacific、Americas、EMEA、China）のリーグ上位12チームが集結し、チャンピオンシップポイントと大会優勝を懸けて戦います。会場はロンドンのCopper Box Arenaで、世界最高峰のチームによる熱戦が繰り広げられます。

author: IGN YouTube
summary: IGN YouTubeは、1995年の『トイ・ストーリー』から始まるピクサーの物語の変遷を振り返る動画を公開。ウッディやバズたちの冒険、そしてシリーズ5作目に向けての情報をまとめている。
raw_text:
How The Series Keeps Ending (And Coming Back Anyway) | Toy Story Franchise Recap
Toy Story revolutionized filmmaking in 1995, becoming the first ever completely computer generated feature film. But more than that, it ushered in the great Pixar era of storytelling, where grown-up and often heartbreaking themes find their way into what present as kids stuff. The combination of slapstick fantasy with grounded emotional relevance has served that adorable lamp company well in the decades since, and n

raw_text: Sega explains why Sonic classic games aren’t coming back anytime soon Why are so many classic Sonic games still trapped on older hardware? Speaking during Sonic’s 35th anniversary celebrations, Iizuka explained that simply porting older titles to modern systems often isn’t enough anymore. Expectations […]

raw_text:

Planet crafters.

author: PC Gamer

raw_text:
After gaming on pro-level panels I can tell you now that 360 Hz is the sweet spot for gaming monitors
And I just don't think I can go back to anything below 240 Hz.
